questionHtml:
Figure 4 represents the circular flow of income in Country A, with values in billions of dollars ($).

Figure 4

The government of Country A decides to increase the level of taxation to $34 billion.

Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how this may affect the level of unemployment.
markschemeHtml: NB A response in which the AS curve shifts to the left, on the basis that the increase in taxation may be indirect taxation, should be rewarded.

meta.title: Using an AD/AS diagram, explain how this may affect the level of unemployment.
breadcrumbLabels: The determinants of AD or causes of shifts in the AD curve
